title: Kavalkaran
actors: M.G. Ramachandran, Jayalalitha J, M.N. Nambiar
plot: Mani is employed as a driver with Marudachalam. Mani and his employer's daughter Susheela fall in love with each other and get married against Marudachalam's wishes. This also enrages Nagu, her father's business partner who intend...
